text: {"matches":[{"type":"equivalent","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":1,"rationale":"Both claims report the same association (higher egg intake → higher LDL) using the identical 2019 NHANES dataset, so they are equivalent."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 2 discusses the combined confirmation from the two studies, a broader evidential claim, while Claim 0 reports a specific dataset finding; thus they are compatible but pertain to different scopes."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 2 refers to the joint confirmation of the effect, whereas Claim 1 is a specific re‑analysis result; they can both be true but address different scopes of evidence."}]}
